title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Abortion pill reversal is not supported by the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists because it is dangerous and not based on science.
A woman who underwent abortion pill reversal came to the ER bleeding out and needing urgent care.
Crisis Pregnancy Centers that offer or refer for abortion pill reversal are part of the new frontier of the anti-abortion movement.
Crisis pregnancy centers outnumber abortion clinics in California by 20%.
75% of crisis pregnancy centers in California do not have a licensed medical professional on site.
Deceptive practices employed by some crisis pregnancy centers pose a significant challenge to providing accurate reproductive health information.
